channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Volvo Launches ES90 Electric Sedan with 755km Range and Fast Charging in SA
item.description: Volvo Cars South Africa has introduced the new ES90, a luxury electric sedan offering a claimed range of 755km on a single charge. Available in three trims ranging from R1.59m to R1.795m, the rear-whe...

item.title: Families Protest at Abuja Works Ministry Over Five Engineers Missing Since 2021
item.description: Dem families and human rights activists don storm the office of the Minister of Works, David Umahi, for Mabushi, Abuja to demand answers for five engineers wey disappear for Ebonyi State since 2021. T...

item.title: Bong Go urges traders and suppliers not to hoard or overprice amid rising fuel and food costs
item.description: Sen. Bong Go has appealed to traders and suppliers not to take advantage of soaring fuel prices by hoarding goods or overpricing basic food items, saying Filipinos are already struggling with the high...

item.title: Scottish Parliament faces tight vote on assisted dying bill for terminally ill adults
item.description: The Scottish Parliament is set to hold a final vote on Tuesday on the Assisted Dying for Terminally Ill Adults (Scotland) Bill, introduced by Liberal Democrat MSP Liam McArthur. If passed, Scotland wo...

item.title: Tanzania’s Commission of Inquiry: Experts Leading National Investigation
item.description: This article talks about how Tanzania, like many other countries, uses commissions of inquiry to examine important national issues. These commissions are legal mechanisms that allow careful investigat...

item.title: Israel Conducts Airstrikes on Iranian and Hezbollah Targets in Tehran and Beirut
item.description: The Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) announced a new wave of airstrikes targeting infrastructure linked to the Iranian regime in Tehran and Hezbollah positions in Beirut. This marks the tenth such operati...

item.title: NDP could regain momentum if it unites behind a strong leader
item.description: Following recent divisions within the Liberal party over arms export legislation, there is an opening for the New Democratic Party (NDP) to strengthen its political position. Notably, Liberal MP Lori ...

item.title: South Africa examines Israel ICJ case amid West Bank family tragedy
item.description: Two young boys survived a shooting in Tammoun, northern West Bank, which killed four members of the Bani Odeh family, including their parents and two siblings. The family had been returning from Nablu...

item.title: Victorian Government criticised over cancellation and cost blowouts of 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.description: The 2026 Commonwealth Games, initially planned to be a major sporting event across regional Victoria, were cancelled in July 2023, leaving a $600 million cost to state taxpayers and sparking widesprea...

item.title: H&M Studio S/S 2026 Collection Showcases Bold and Eccentric Designs
item.description: The H&M Studio Spring/Summer 2026 collection is a clear departure from the understated tones of past fashion trends, favouring eccentricity and individuality. Cape Town hosted an exclusive preview at ...

item.title: Complete Results of Rajya Sabha Elections 2026 in Bihar, Odisha, and Haryana
item.description: The Rajya Sabha elections 2026 were conducted on Monday to fill 37 seats across ten states in India. While many candidates were elected unopposed, voting was necessary for eleven seats, including five...

item.title: Government Urged to Compensate Police Brutality Victims and Hold Officers Accountable
item.description: The opinion piece calls on the Kenyan government to take decisive action against ongoing police brutality by compensating victims and punishing the officers responsible. It highlights how police have ...

item.title: Govt Plans Subsidised Fuel Programme for Low-Income Road Users Amid Price Surge
item.description: The federal government of Pakistan is preparing a subsidised fuel scheme aimed at providing relief to motorcyclists and rickshaw drivers following a sharp rise in oil prices, partly triggered by the o...

item.title: Cebu Pacific celebrates anniversary with special P19.96 seat sale
item.description: Cebu Pacific, one of the Philippines’ leading low-cost carriers, is offering a special seat sale priced at P19.96 per seat to celebrate the airline’s founding year and first flight anniversary. This p...

item.title: Trump asks allies to secure Strait of Hormuz but Japan and Australia decline
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has asked other countries to help reopen and protect the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial route for global oil shipments. He said nations relying heavily on Gulf oil should take...

item.title: Rep. Jasmine Crockett responds after security guard dies in police standoff; guard faced impersonation charges
item.description: A security guard employed by Texas Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett, identified as Diamon-Mazairre Robinson, 39, was killed in a SWAT standoff with Dallas Police. Robinson had barricaded himself in a ve...

item.title: Complete List of 2025 Sahitya Akademi Award Winners Across 24 Languages
item.description: The winners of the 2025 Sahitya Akademi Awards were announced on 16th March. This year, the awards recognised outstanding literary works across 24 Indian languages. A total of 24 authors won in variou...

item.title: Multiple Bomb Blasts Kill 23, Injure Over 100 in Maiduguri
item.description: Police for Borno State don confirm say 23 people don die and 108 don get injury after multiple bomb blasts wey scatter Maiduguri on Monday night. The attacks happen around 7:24 p.m. and e target busy ...

item.title: PNP closes in on suspect in Nueva Ecija double murder case
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has identified the gunman responsible for the killing of businesswoman Regine Espinosa and Michael Odchigue, an employee of the Palayan City Disaster Risk Reductio...

item.title: Kerala Congress (M) and BDJS Declare Their Candidates for Upcoming Assembly Elections
item.description: Kerala Congress (M), which is a part of the ruling Left Democratic Front (LDF), and Bharat Dharma Jana Sena (BDJS), an ally of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), have announced the names of their candi...
